evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the initial booking creates follow-ups automatically, as specified in the requirement. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation of follow-up bookings being created automatically after the initial booking. The only evidence available pertains to the initial booking itself, without any indication of downstream effects or follow-up actions, which constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of automatic follow-up bookings created after the initial booking.
